packages.name: SenseCAP Indicator
packages.description: Drives up to 12 pages on a SenseCAP Indicator D1 touchscreen (openHASP/MQTT): motion, contact, water, smoke, lock, garage, light, thermostat, weather, and an alarm clock page. By jlslate.

packages.name: Composite Device
packages.description: Builds one virtual device by pooling multiple real devices of a single chosen type: water, lock, door, window, smoke, motion, garage door, temperature, humidity, or illuminance.
